title: Israel and the US attack Iran: What happened in the first hours of bombing
subhead: Several sites in Tehran, Isfahan and Tabriz were struck on Saturday morning. Israel has declared a 'special state of emergency.' The Israeli army also targeted positions held by Hezbollah, the pro-Iran Shiite movement in southern Lebanon.

title: Paramount acquires Warner Bros. in $110 billion deal, creating Hollywood behemoth
subhead: The final deal caps a five-month bidding battle with Netflix, and will give birth to one of the most powerful entertainment conglomerates in the world.

title: Bruno Mars stays as 'feel good' as ever with his new album, 'The Romantic'
subhead: The American multi-instrumentalist and singer has released his fourth solo album 10 years after the success of '24K Magic.'

title: Behind Trump and Anthropic standoff lies multifaceted debates over military's use of AI
subhead: The US president ordered his administration to 'immediately cease' using the start-up's artificial intelligence model after the company refused to make it freely available to the military. The decision has sparked intense debate.

How Paris is turning into 'Frollywood,' a refuge for American actors
subhead: Whether George Clooney, Matt Dillon or Kristen Stewart, France is attracting more and more actors from across the Atlantic. This trend speaks to both the Trump-era crisis and the decline of the Hollywood model.

title: Ukraine: 'The war could still last for years and paradoxically, time is not on the Kremlin's side'
subhead: Researcher Dimitri Minic tells Le Monde in an interview that it is 'too soon to write off Ukraine,' even though the balance of power currently favors Russia.

title: 'The unnatural alliance between Trump and White evangelicals has cost them dearly, even if it allowed them to gain positions of power'
subhead: Historian Sébastien Fath discusses the history and dynamics of evangelical Protestant churches in an interview with Le Monde. Despite their current vibrancy, their growth is not inevitable, the researcher argues.
